scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @cardano-ibc/planner && npm run build -w @cardano-ibc/tx-builder && npm run build -w @cardano-ibc/tx-builder-runtime
scripts.build:gateway: npm run build:proto-types && npm run build:packages && npm run build -w gateway
scripts.build:swap-client: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w react-cardano
scripts.build: npm run build:gateway && npm run build:swap-client
